final_prompt.prompt:
Create a hyperrealistic jewelry close-up photograph of a sapphire ring with diamond setting (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a hyperrealistic macro photography aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be extreme close-up macro framing to reveal every detail
Subject: must include a sapphire ring with diamond-encrusted setting, light refracting inside the gemstone as fire and brilliance
Scene/backdrop: must include a black velvet background
Lighting/mood: needs a luxurious, high-drama light atmosphere that emphasizes internal refraction and fire within the sapphire — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a deep blue sapphire dominant with diamond sparkle accents against deep black — exact tonal balance is yours
Materials/textures: needs a surface treatment that renders every facet, metal grain, and velvet fiber with photorealistic fidelity — exact micro-texture execution is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve extreme detail rendering — every facet and setting prong must be visible
Avoid:
